ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-04-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-13-2022 Continued To Oct-04-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Lauren Peebles, via Zoom, for Kirsten Smith, Personal Representative.

Ms. Van Peebles reports that a petition for Final Distribution is complete and is waiting for her client's verification signature to file it and expects the petition to be filed by tomorrow.

The matter is continued to Oct-04-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Martinez. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-13-2022 Continued To Sep-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Vernon Goins, via Zoom, specially appearing for Lauren Peebles, for Kirsten Smith, Personal Representative.

Counsel reports of the filing of an inventory and appraisal in late May and of Ms. Peebles working with an out-of-state counsel to confirm possible foreign assets and requests a continuance of ninety to one hundred and twenty days. Court points to the status of this matter and of the delays in closing the estate and advises counsel that it is willing to allow for a continuance of sixty days but that the court will expect the filing of either a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration by the next calling of this matter.

The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Sep-13-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Cecilia Castellanos. Examiner: Sandra Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-14-2022 Continued To Jul-13-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jun-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration With Will Annexed. The will dated February 21, 2012 is admitted to probate. Kirsten Smith is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Amy Harrington is appointed probate referee. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for June 14, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.
